top_signals.title: Gold Drops as Fed’s Waller Says Next Move Likely To Be Rate Hike
top_signals.summary: Gold declined as traders ramped up bets on Federal Reserve monetary tightening after Governor Christopher Waller warned the Iran war’s energy shock could fuel inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: F2Pool founder who controls 11% of bitcoin's hashrate to lead first SpaceX mission to Mars
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Muni Bond Sales Surge in 2026
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Aashah Shah joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." May has been a strong month for muni bond issuance, with about $35 billion of sales so far this year. This month has seen the most debt for a similar period in May since at least 2015, Bloomberg data show. (Source: Bloomberg)
